headline: Jim Cramer on Costco: “It Got a Little Too Expensive”

headline: Costco makes payment change that could speed up checkout for members
summary: Costco has expanded its digital wallet feature, allowing members to link any Visa card to the Costco app for faster checkout at registers.

headline: COST Stock Retreats After Hours On Decelerating Comparable Sales After Strong May Performance
summary: Costco reported net sales of $29.24 billion for the five weeks ended July 5, 2026, a 10.6% increase from $26.44 billion a year earlier.
